name: Cylinder Spotlight - Room Essentials™
description:
Highlight walkways, plants or outdoor features with this Cylinder Spotlight from Room Essentials™. Designed in a clean, compact shape, this spotlight delivers focused illumination with a warm 3000K LED light that turns on automatically at dusk and off at dawn. The all-weather plastic construction makes it suitable for year-round outdoor use, while the battery-powered design and simple assembly let you place it exactly where you need light.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
